name: Hydro Hybrid
comment: Part of ADJ’s Hydro Series, the Hydro Hybrid is a IP65-rated hybrid moving head that produces a beam, spot and wash effect powered by a 420-Watt Osram SIRIUS HRI discharge lamp.

capabilities.comment: Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation fast to slow
Counter-Clockwise Color Wheel Rotation slow to fast
Clockwise Gobo Rotation slow to fast
Counter Clockwise Gobo Rotation fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: Part of ADJ’s Hydro Series, the Hydro Hybrid is a IP65-rated hybrid moving head that produces a beam, spot and wash effect powered by a 420-Watt Osram SIRIUS HRI discharge lamp.
